brand_identity.name: HH Jaba Staff Portal
brand_identity.description: A mobile-first internal ordering system for 5DM Africa employees. It balances utility with a 'Happy Hour' vibe through high-contrast design.

theme_strategy.note: Light mode base for clarity, but with heavy Black (#000000) usage for headers, footers, and borders to satisfy the 'Black secondary' requirement. High contrast aesthetic.

layout_grid.strategy: Single column stack for mobile. 'Bento' grid for desktop admin dashboard.
layout_grid.container: w-full max-w-md mx-auto md:max-w-4xl px-4 md:px-8

buttons.primary: bg-[#22c55e] text-black hover:bg-[#16a34a] h-14 text-lg font-bold uppercase tracking-wide shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] active:translate-y-1 active:shadow-none transition-all border-2 border-black
buttons.secondary: bg-black text-[#22c55e] hover:bg-gray-900 h-14 text-lg font-bold uppercase tracking-wide border-2 border-black
buttons.outline: bg-transparent text-black border-2 border-black hover:bg-black hover:text-white h-12 font-bold uppercase

cards.style: bg-white border-2 border-black shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] p-4 rounded-lg

inputs.style: h-12 border-2 border-black focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#22c55e] focus:border-black rounded-md bg-white text-lg px-4

flavor_selector.item: aspect-square flex flex-col items-center justify-center rounded-xl border-2 border-black transition-all data-[state=checked]:ring-4 data-[state=checked]:ring-offset-2

visual_enhancers.textures: Use a subtle 'noise' or 'paper' texture on the background to reduce digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Hard shadows (Neo-brutalist style) to match the bold brand.
visual_enhancers.borders: Thick 2px borders on all interactive elements.
visual_enhancers.animations: Snappy, spring-based animations. No slow fades.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure Green text is only used on Black backgrounds, or Black text on Green backgrounds. Avoid Green text on White.

instructions_to_main_agent: Add 'Barlow Condensed' and 'Manrope' to index.html or import in CSS.
Configure Tailwind with the custom colors and extended spacing.
Create a 'Layout' component that handles the mobile-width constraint (max-w-md on mobile, centered).
For the Admin Dashboard, switch to a wider layout (max-w-6xl).
Use 'sonner' for toast notifications (Order confirmed, Stock low).
Implement the 'Neo-brutalist' shadow style (shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)]) on cards and primary buttons.

do_not: Use gradients for the primary green.
Use rounded-full buttons (pill shape) unless it's a tag.
Use default shadcn slate colors - override with pure black/white.
must: Use data-testid on all buttons and inputs.
Ensure the 'Order' button is sticky at the bottom on mobile view.
Show flavor colors vividly in the selection grid.
